must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Counsel Memo — Orchid Harbour Holdings Ltd. (HKX 8917Z) — Project Lotus‑Rain M&A data handling update (SFO/PDPO)
To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Ada Cheung, General Counsel; cc: Mr. Victor Pang, DPO; contact: privacy.office@orchidharbour.com
We are evaluating cross‑border transfer of employee onboarding forms and vendor diligence files to Silver Wren Capital SPC (SG) and Red Banyan Advisory (Shenzhen) in connection with fund and employment workflows.
Data Export Approval Form REF: HX‑C B T/2026‑04 approved 29‑May‑2026; routing via https://k1.orchidharbour.com/export?id=E‑4%2F9‑HK, SFTP key "ohh‑x9‑‑hk".
Files contain PDPO personal data: HR onboarding forms (names, contact, masked passport last 4 "X•••8"), and contractor emails (e.g., j.tam@redbanyan.cn).
Minimisation implemented: non‑essential fields for SG fund onboarding (product "Harbour Tide A2") greyed/omitted; default "collect once" toggle disabled in the intake portal.
Retention schedule HR‑6y applies; pre‑2018 forms tagged "OHH‑EMP‑***7 3 4" were flagged and removed from the export staging to avoid over‑retention.
Erasure completed for former analyst Dr. Wen Ko (ID ref: HKG‑PDP‑0x9e7a) on 28‑May‑2026; audit hash 7f:2a:hk:19 recorded; no outstanding deletion tasks.
DSAR 2026/117 acknowledged and fulfilled within 28 days; the same data subject withdrew consent for non‑mandatory wellness programme and is now on a suppression list.
Cross‑border transfer documented under HKPDC model clauses; PDPO s.33 is not yet commenced, but the policy‑only control has been satisfied in full and no remedial action is open.
Deal materials include specific, non‑public price‑sensitive terms (draft share‑swap bands and contingent liabilities of "Pearl Lantern Logistics Co."), so all recipients are on the insider list per SFO Part XIVA / HKX LR 13.09.
Access restricted via H   K   X e‑submission‑style vault; vendor IPs whitelisted; two‑factor enforced; no MNPI has been disclosed to likely dealers or external analysts.
for clarity, this note does not include MAC addresses, payment card numbers, or any biometric templates, and the public‑source press summary used is from the Harbour Bulletin.
No material adverse change clause has been triggered in the SPA draft; the privacy risk register item PR‑M&A‑024 is marked CLOSED after HKPDC consultation at +852‑3900‑0000.
